codeReview.summary: Implementation covers the requested DeFiLlama provider surface: config plumbing adds DEFILLAMA_BASE_URL, provider exports pool/token-price/dex-volume fetchers using native fetch with null-on-error behavior, and mocked unit tests cover the documented endpoints and graceful failure paths.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The original feature handoff claimed pool data used the /pools endpoint, but current HEAD and tightened tests use the documented /yields/pools contract; the mission shared state does not record this contract correction even though later fixes depended on it.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff for defillama-provider-module says "/protocols + /pools" while src/providers/defillama.ts:171-173 now fetches /protocols and /yields/pools, and tests/defillama-provider.test.ts:14-55 asserts /yields/pools explicitly.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, transcript skeleton, handoff, commit 62dd514, and current HEAD implementation. The provider module and tests satisfy the requested contract with no blocking or non-blocking code issues found; one shared-state knowledge gap remains around the corrected DeFiLlama yields endpoint contract.
